title: Filesystem Adapter Implementation
purpose: Implement the Phase 1 filesystem adapter that replaces direct file mutations across all governance runtime scripts.
architectural_constraints: Error handling with retry and governance event emission

deliverables.description: Migration script for existing direct mutations

acceptance_criteria: All runtime scripts use storage adapter (grep for direct fs.writeFileSync → 0 hits in runtime)
Atomic writes verified (no partial writes under crash)
Migration script converts all existing mutations

traceability.description: Hardened filesystem adapter with atomic writes, retry, governance events; created migration scanner and test suite
